deterministic_predicates.description: All required process facts must be known before drafting final values.

reversible_action_predicates.description: Local draft values may be prepared without touching the official record.
Saving a draft is reversible before final submission.

exact_confirmation_predicates.description: Permit request submission requires user attendance and exact confirmation.
Certification and acknowledgement steps are consequential.

refused_action_predicates.description: Final payment execution is refused without attended handoff.
Official record uploads are blocked until attended confirmation.
